name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a free new-patient consultation! To get you on the books: any preferred day/time that works best? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check (or no worries if not)?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time for their new-patient consultation AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for {{preferred_start}} — we're so glad you picked us, and we promise a calm, no-pressure visit.

What to expect: a relaxed 45-minute new-patient consultation, a friendly tour of our modern tech, and plenty of space for any questions you've been holding onto. No sales pitch, ever.

Need to reschedule or let us know something ahead of time? Just reply to this email or text us back — a real human will answer.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
